DB metric probes (opendbx-specific, Stage 1+ for skeleton, Stage 3 for full)

Usage:
  opendbx sentinel [command]

Available Commands:
  start       Start the sentinel probes
  status      Show sentinel probe status
  stop        Stop the sentinel probes

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for sentinel

Global Flags:
  -d, --debug string        Enable debug mode with optional category filtering (e.g., "api,hooks" or "!1p,!file")
      --debug-file string   Write debug logs to a specific file path (implicitly enables debug mode)
      --verbose             Override verbose mode setting from config

Use "opendbx sentinel [command] --help" for more information about a command.
